description: Get up and running in three simple steps.

items.title: 1. Create Your Workspace
items.content: Sign up in seconds and invite your team members. No credit card required to start.

items.title: 2. Connect Your Tools
items.content: Link your existing tools like Slack, GitHub, and Google Workspace with one-click integrations.

items.title: 3. Start Collaborating
items.content: Build your first workflow, assign tasks, and track progress with real-time dashboards.
